description: SQLAlchemy `create_all` skips existing tables, so any `Index()` added to an existing model never deploys. Add a `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS` block in `app/main.py`'s migration section that enumerates every Index() defined on models and ensures it exists. Optionally extend with a startup lint that diffs declared indexes against `sqlite_master` and warns on mismatch.
title: Add CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS guard to startup migration
